prompt: Canonical name for the per-work-item selection column? This doc proposes `driver`; P284 already wrote `backend` into its (not-yet-implemented) design.

Include the UtilityModel decoupling (the four direct-Anthropic call sites: live-status, pane-summary, magic-wand, attentions backstop) in v1 scope, rather than deferring it as future work?
